aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to significant gaps in structured data and authority signals. While the business has decent local visibility, it lacks the necessary optimizations to stand out in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Add FAQ schema to capture conversational queries

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained but has critical inconsistencies with the website.
critical_issues: Phone number mismatch between GBP and website
Missing regular posts or Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with a major phone number discrepancy impacting local SEO.
action_items: Update the phone number on the website to match GBP
Audit and correct NAP across all directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service guides

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data limits AI comprehension of services and expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Jacksonville' or 'emergency HVAC services'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to capture local and service-based queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed service guides to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by closing your schema and authority gaps.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The absence of LocalBusiness and FAQ schema means AI models can't easily cite their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and authority-building content to make your business the top AI-recommended choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential customers—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Optimize Your HVAC Business Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out in AI-driven search results.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
